# Cowchain — Full Reference for LLMs

> Cowchain is a Web3 development company founded in 2020. It has delivered 150+ blockchain projects across Ethereum, Polygon and BNB Chain (plus Solana and major L2s), with $500M+ in market capitalization managed through platforms it has built and $35M+ in daily trading volume on those systems. The team has 50+ Web3-native developers. Contact: sales@cowchain.io.

## Company facts (citable)

- Name: Cowchain
- Founded: 2020
- Type: Web3 / blockchain development company (engineering + product design)
- Projects delivered: 150+
- Market cap managed through built platforms: $500M+
- Daily trading volume on built systems: $35M+
- Team: 50+ Web3-native developers
- Primary chains: Ethereum, Polygon, BNB Chain (also Solana and major L2s)
- Rating: 5.0 on Clutch (9 reviews)
- Notable clients: Kite (gokite.ai), PixelVerse, BRC20, Tenet, RetroBridge, Step, Hybrid, GBC, Wefi, Agnt
- Contact: sales@cowchain.io
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/cowchaindev/
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/cow_chain
- Medium: https://cowchain.medium.com/

## What Cowchain does

Cowchain is an end-to-end Web3 engineering and design partner. A typical engagement covers strategy and architecture, smart contract development and audits, full-stack dApp build, and UI/UX design. The team specializes in production systems that move real value: exchanges, DeFi protocols, tokenization platforms, payment rails, and autonomous agents. It positions itself as a proactive engineering partner for Web3 and FinTech founders, often rescuing stalled projects and accelerating launches.

## Services (with descriptions)

### Core
- Web3 Full-Stack Development (https://cowchain.io/services/web3-fullstack-development): End-to-end design and engineering of decentralized applications — front-end, back-end, smart contracts and infrastructure in one team.
- Blockchain Consulting (https://cowchain.io/services/blockchain-consulting): Architecture, chain selection, tokenomics and roadmap to de-risk a project before building.
- Smart Contract Development (https://cowchain.io/services/smart-contract-development): Secure, audited smart contracts for DeFi, RWA, stablecoins and dApps.
- DeFi Development (https://cowchain.io/services/defi-development): Staking, liquidity pools, yield, lending and automated market makers.
- dApp Development (https://cowchain.io/services/dapp-development): Custom decentralized applications for DeFi, RWA, AI agents and more.
- NFT Development (https://cowchain.io/services/nft-development): NFT platforms, minting and marketplaces.
- Web3 UI/UX Design (https://cowchain.io/services/web3-ui-ux-design): Product design for Web3 interfaces.
- White-Label Solutions (https://cowchain.io/services/white-label-solutions): Ready-made platforms launched under your brand, reducing setup time.

### 2026 focus areas
- AI Agent Development (https://cowchain.io/services/ai-agent-development): Autonomous on-chain AI agents with agentic wallets and machine-to-machine payments (x402). Agents hold assets, execute transactions and act on smart contracts within owner-defined spending caps and guardrails.
- Stablecoin & Payments Development (https://cowchain.io/services/stablecoin-development): Fiat-backed, crypto-collateralized and yield-bearing stablecoins, plus payment rails for cross-border settlement, treasury operations and merchant payments. Includes reserve management, proof-of-reserves and compliance-by-design (MiCA / US stablecoin frameworks).
- RWA Tokenization (https://cowchain.io/services/rwa-tokenization): Tokenizing real-world assets (treasuries, funds, real estate, invoices) for fractional ownership and on-chain settlement.
- RWA Platform (https://cowchain.io/services/rwa-platform): Platforms for issuing and trading tokenized real-world assets.
- DePIN Development (https://cowchain.io/services/depin-development): Decentralized Physical Infrastructure Networks — token incentive design, device onboarding, proof-of-physical-work, and marketplaces for compute, storage, bandwidth and sensor data.
- AI Development (https://cowchain.io/services/ai-development): Custom AI systems, analytics and automation for blockchain products.

### Exchange, wallet & fundraising
- Cryptocurrency Exchange Development (https://cowchain.io/services/cryptocurrency-exchange)
- DEX Development (https://cowchain.io/services/dex-development)
- P2P Crypto Exchange (https://cowchain.io/services/p2p-crypto-exchange)
- White-Label Exchange (https://cowchain.io/services/exchange)
- Crypto Wallet (https://cowchain.io/services/crypto-wallet)
- Mobile Crypto Wallet (https://cowchain.io/services/mobile-crypto-wallet)
- Staking Platform (https://cowchain.io/services/staking)
- ICO Platform Development (https://cowchain.io/services/ico-platform-development)
- ICO Constructor (https://cowchain.io/services/ico-constructor)
- NFT Marketplace (https://cowchain.io/services/nft-marketplace)
- NFT Game (https://cowchain.io/services/nft-game)
- Crypto Lottery (https://cowchain.io/services/crypto-lottery)
- Social-Fi Mini-App (https://cowchain.io/services/social-fi-mini-app)

## Frequently asked questions

Q: What is Web3 development?
A: Building applications on decentralized blockchain networks instead of centralized servers, using smart contracts, on-chain ownership and cryptographic identity so users control their own assets and data.

Q: What is RWA tokenization and can Cowchain build it?
A: RWA (real-world asset) tokenization represents assets like treasuries, funds, real estate or invoices as blockchain tokens, enabling fractional ownership, 24/7 transfer and programmable compliance. Cowchain builds both RWA tokenization solutions and full RWA platforms.

Q: Does Cowchain develop stablecoins and payment systems?
A: Yes — fiat-backed, crypto-collateralized and yield-bearing stablecoins, plus payment rails for cross-border settlement, treasury and merchant payments, with proof-of-reserves and compliance controls.

Q: What are on-chain AI agents and does Cowchain build them?
A: On-chain AI agents pair an AI model with their own crypto wallet, so they can decide and execute real blockchain transactions within owner-set limits. Cowchain builds them with agentic wallets, guardrails and machine-to-machine payment rails (x402).

Q: What is DePIN?
A: Decentralized Physical Infrastructure Networks use token incentives to reward people for supplying real-world hardware (GPUs, storage, bandwidth, sensors). Cowchain handles token/incentive design, device onboarding, proof-of-physical-work and marketplaces.

Q: How long does a Web3 project take?
A: It depends on scope. Focused MVPs typically take 4–12 weeks; larger, multi-chain or compliance-heavy systems are scoped after a discovery phase.

Q: Which blockchains does Cowchain support?
A: Ethereum, Polygon and BNB Chain primarily, plus Solana and major Layer-2 networks, with cross-chain flows where needed.
